title: Overnight/intraday decomposition + daily microstructure proxies (zero-cost new-information features)
why: Lou-Polk-Skouras (JFE 2019, t~5): anomaly returns split overnight vs intraday; large-cap momentum is overnight; EWMA components forecast returns at exactly our 5-10d horizon. Computable from open+close we already have. Plus LdP ch.19 bar-computable liquidity proxies (Amihud, Corwin-Schultz, Roll) - top of his MDA ranking. Cheapest possible test of whether NEW information moves panel AUC off 0.53. PRE-CHECK REQUIRED: audit CSVs carry true session opens, not prior closes (corrupts overnight returns).
scope: Data audit: verify open != prior close systematically across the 44 tickers
build_tier2_features: r_overnight, r_intraday, EWMA components (10/21/60d), tug-of-war spread
Amihud lambda (daily), Corwin-Schultz spread, Roll measure as meta-features
Pre-registered A/B: pooled run with vs without the block; falsification = AUC and trade-quality unmoved

history.reason: from advisor consult - build first, week 1, $0
